resources.string: Stay connected, one spark at a time ✨
Type a time of day (e.g. Morning, Afternoon…)
Your social spark will appear here…
🌅 Send a \"Good morning!\" text to a family member. A small message can brighten their whole day!
☕ Reach out to a colleague with a quick \"Thank you\" — gratitude goes a long way!
😄 Share a funny meme or an interesting link with a friend. Laughter is the best connector!
🍪 Send a quick \"thinking of you\" message to someone you care about. It only takes a second!
🍽️ Call a friend or relative for a 5-minute catch-up. Hearing a voice means more than a text!
🌙 Leave a thoughtful comment on a friend\'s social media post. Show them you noticed!
Oops! You forgot to type something. 😅\nTry entering a time like \"Morning\" or \"Dinner\"!

Hmm, I don't recognise that time of day. 🤔

Try one of these:
• Morning
• Mid-morning
• Afternoon
• Afternoon Snack Time
• Dinner
• Night
